description: Create a Lorenz Curve visualization in GeoGebra using 2020 US Census data. Use the following income shares by quintile: Lowest Fifth (3.0%), Second Fifth (8.1%), Third Fifth (14.0%), Fourth Fifth (22.6%), and Highest Fifth (52.3%). The visualization must include the Lorenz Curve fitted to the cumulative income shares, the Line of Perfect Equality (y = x), and a text annotation showing the calculated Gini Coefficient. Save the project as 'lorenz_inequality.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
